open_issues.note: OWNER ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA (2026-07-19, this stage passes if): (1) first T1 falls at 10-20 game-min (ideal 5-10, tolerated to 20); (2) T2s fall ~30 min; (3) all towers that should fall are down before 40 min. Do NOT hard-block on ideal timing — bot farm efficiency/micro polish comes later, per-hero. Score iter-0004 from soak/run_20260719_0716 against these. Live so far: T1s 10.7-22.6min (mostly in range), first T2s 24-26min (ahead of the 30min line). Also verify winner meaningful + no feeding-while-ahead.

PushThink retreats on a single tower hit whenever a creep wave is present (WasRecentlyDamagedByTower window 2-4s) -> bots yo-yo under towers, gutting building DPS. Micro change; verify in-game before touching. aba_push.lua PushThink, TS mirror.

Owner observation (live watching iter-0004): bots' fight willingness seems weak and push tempo slower than human games — no proactive 'take tower after won fight' linkage, no dedicated push strategy. Long-term per-hero/macro polish item, not a blocker for this stage.

11-20/game 'error in error handling', no consistent context. Bot-VM print() does NOT reach dedicated-server console, so in-game markers are invisible — unmasking needs an error()-based emit or on-instance probe of a live game.
Pre-fix losing side did ~0 building dmg. If this persists with fair drafts (post iter-0001 cohort), hunt a defend-lock in mode desires beyond the fixed gates.
All games flag GetDesire hotspots, max ~7ms (sniper/CM/lion/PA/slardar...). Frame-budget risk; profile after macro fixes settle.
~74/game engine rejections: orders on dead units (order 19/20). Sloppy target validation, low priority.
Pre-fix feeder/low_gpm stats (lich 55K/207D etc.) all confounded by rigged draft. Re-rank from post-iter-0002 games.
